title: galium ionicum
intro: Galium ionicum, also known as Sea Milkwort or Marsh Milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in marshy areas, and its medicinal properties have been used for centuries to treat a variety of health issues. The plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Galium ionicum include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and diarrhea.
